description_long: This is a round, black frying pan with a deep, smooth interior and a single straight handle extending from one side. The pan's body appears to be made of metal, likely cast iron or aluminum, with a matte black finish that suggests a non-stick or seasoned surface. The handle is solid, straight, and matches the pan in color, with no visible ergonomic shaping or grip texture. The rim of the pan is slightly thick and straight, without any flaring or pouring spouts, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. There are no visible brand logos, decorative elements, or hanging holes on the handle. The bottom of the pan is not fully visible, but it appears smooth and unmarked, lacking any ridges or patterns.
description: A round, matte black frying pan with a straight, solid handle and a smooth, deep interior. The design is simple and utilitarian, with no visible logos or special features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular opening of the pan and the straight handle extending directly toward the viewer.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the pan and the full length of the straight handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the handle and the pan's circular rim, with no visible hanging hole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pan's profile and the handle extending to the left.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight, solid handle made of polymer or coated metal, no ergonomic shaping or grip texture, not detachable.
attribute_rim_design: Straight, slightly thick rim with no flaring, pouring spouts, or reinforced edges.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth and unmarked, no visible ridges, circles, or brand stamps.
